function.name: esp_resolve_board
function.description: Resolve a human ESP board or module model to PlatformIO build parameters and list supported presets.

board_model.description: Human board/module model id, such as esp32-s3-n16r8, esp32-s3-n8r8, esp32-s3-n8, luatos-esp32c3-core, esp32-c3-devkitm-1, esp32-c3-devkitc-02, esp32-devkit-v1, or esp32-wrover. Used to resolve PlatformIO board, flash, PSRAM, USB CDC, and partitions.

board.description: Optional raw PlatformIO board id override. Leave empty to use board_model preset.

flash_size.description: Optional flash size override, such as 4MB, 8MB, or 16MB.

memory_type.description: Optional Arduino memory type override. Leave empty to use preset.

partitions.description: Optional PlatformIO partition CSV override. Leave empty to use preset.

function.name: esp_generate_project
function.description: Generate a PlatformIO Arduino project for an ESP-series board. The project can include optional helper functions for I2C, OLED, LED, buzzer, AHT20, and structured serial logs; peripherals are only used when explicitly configured or called.

project_name.description: Project directory name under the generated workspace.

board_model.description: Human board/module model id, such as esp32-s3-n16r8, esp32-s3-n8r8, esp32-s3-n8, luatos-esp32c3-core, esp32-c3-devkitm-1, esp32-c3-devkitc-02, esp32-devkit-v1, or esp32-wrover. Used to resolve PlatformIO board, flash, PSRAM, USB CDC, and partitions.

flash_size.description: ESP module flash size. Default matches selected ESP board.

memory_type.description: Arduino memory type. Leave empty unless the selected ESP board preset requires a memory type override.

partitions.description: Partition table CSV. Default uses the selected board preset partition layout.

sda_pin.description: I2C SDA GPIO for configured I2C peripherals. Use -1 when I2C is not configured.

scl_pin.description: I2C SCL GPIO for configured I2C peripherals. Use -1 when I2C is not configured.

oled_reset_pin.description: OLED RES pin GPIO. Use -1 if tied to reset or not controlled.

oled_dc_pin.description: OLED DC pin GPIO. Required for 6-pin SPI OLED modules; use -1 for I2C OLED or when not configured.

workspace.description: Optional output workspace path. Defaults to .esp_agent/projects under the user home.

oled_clk_pin.description: Dedicated SPI OLED CLK/SCK GPIO. Use -1 when not configured.

oled_mosi_pin.description: Dedicated SPI OLED MOSI/DIN GPIO. Use -1 when not configured.

oled_protocol.description: OLED protocol: spi, i2c, or auto.

function.name: esp_run_firmware_task
function.description: Run generate -> compile -> optional flash -> optional monitor for an arbitrary user-described ESP firmware task, such as LED control, AHT20 reading, OLED display, or buzzer melody.

task.description: Optional task hint. Use auto for natural-language inference, custom when custom_code is provided.

task_description.description: Natural-language firmware goal, such as turn on LED, read AHT20, show OLED text, or play a melody.

custom_code.description: Optional complete Arduino main.cpp generated and controlled by the model. The generated project always includes src/agent_peripherals.h/cpp; the model may include agent_peripherals.h and call helper APIs such as agentInit, oledShowChinese, ledSet, buzzerBeep, and aht20Read.

project_name.description: Project directory name. If omitted, a task-specific name is generated.

board_model.description: Human board/module model id, such as esp32-s3-n16r8, esp32-s3-n8r8, esp32-s3-n8, luatos-esp32c3-core, esp32-c3-devkitm-1, esp32-c3-devkitc-02, esp32-devkit-v1, or esp32-wrover. Used to resolve PlatformIO board, flash, PSRAM, USB CDC, and partitions.

board.description: Optional raw PlatformIO board id override. Leave empty to use board_model preset.

oled_clk_pin.description: Dedicated SPI OLED CLK/SCK GPIO. Required when oled_protocol=spi; use -1 when SPI OLED is not configured.

oled_mosi_pin.description: Dedicated SPI OLED MOSI/DIN GPIO. Required when oled_protocol=spi; use -1 when SPI OLED is not configured.

oled_protocol.description: OLED protocol: spi for 6-pin SCL/SDA/RES/DC modules, i2c for 4-pin I2C modules, auto to infer from DC pin.

oled_text.description: Text to show on OLED when the selected/generated task uses display output.

port.description: Optional serial port. If omitted, flash and monitor are skipped.

function.name: esp_generate_firmware_task_project
function.description: Generate a PlatformIO Arduino project for a user-described ESP firmware task. The application main.cpp is model-owned or planner-owned, while src/agent_peripherals.h/cpp provides optional helper functions for OLED, LED, buzzer, AHT20, and heartbeat logs.

task.description: Optional task hint. Use auto for natural-language inference, custom when custom_code is provided.

task_description.description: Natural-language firmware goal, such as turn on LED, read AHT20, show OLED text, or play a melody.

custom_code.description: Optional complete Arduino main.cpp generated and controlled by the model. The generated project always includes src/agent_peripherals.h/cpp; the model may include agent_peripherals.h and call helper APIs such as agentInit, oledShowChinese, ledSet, buzzerBeep, and aht20Read.

project_name.description: Project directory name. If omitted, a task-specific name is generated.

board_model.description: Human board/module model id, such as esp32-s3-n16r8, esp32-s3-n8r8, esp32-s3-n8, luatos-esp32c3-core, esp32-c3-devkitm-1, esp32-c3-devkitc-02, esp32-devkit-v1, or esp32-wrover. Used to resolve PlatformIO board, flash, PSRAM, USB CDC, and partitions.

oled_clk_pin.description: Dedicated SPI OLED CLK/SCK GPIO. Required when oled_protocol=spi; use -1 when SPI OLED is not configured.

oled_mosi_pin.description: Dedicated SPI OLED MOSI/DIN GPIO. Required when oled_protocol=spi; use -1 when SPI OLED is not configured.

oled_protocol.description: OLED protocol: spi for 6-pin SCL/SDA/RES/DC modules, i2c for 4-pin I2C modules, auto to infer from DC pin.

oled_text.description: Text to show on OLED when the selected/generated task uses display output.

workspace.description: Optional output workspace path. Defaults to .esp_agent/projects under the user home.

function.name: esp_compile_project
function.description: Run PlatformIO build for a generated ESP PlatformIO project and summarize build errors.

function.name: esp_validate_gpio
function.description: Validate ESP GPIO choices for range, duplicate assignments, USB pins, strapping pins, flash/PSRAM risks, and JTAG caveats before generating or flashing firmware.

board_model.description: ESP board model used for family-specific GPIO validation, such as esp32-s3-n16r8, luatos-esp32c3-core, or esp8266-nodemcuv2.

oled_clk_pin.description: Dedicated SPI OLED CLK/SCK GPIO. Use -1 when not configured.

oled_mosi_pin.description: Dedicated SPI OLED MOSI/DIN GPIO. Use -1 when not configured.

oled_protocol.description: OLED protocol: spi, i2c, or auto.

function.name: esp_flash_project
function.description: Upload a compiled ESP PlatformIO project to the board.

port.description: Optional serial port, such as COM5.

function.name: esp_monitor_serial
function.description: Read ESP serial output for a fixed duration.

function.name: esp_list_serial_ports
function.description: List serial ports visible to pyserial for ESP upload and monitoring.

function.name: esp_preflight
function.description: Check Python, pyserial, PlatformIO, serial ports, diagnosis self-test, and USB-UART readiness before hardware bring-up.

function.name: esp_diagnose_log
function.description: Diagnose ESP build, flash, or serial logs and produce evidence-based next actions.

log.description: Combined build, upload, or serial log.

function.name: esp_task_observation_check
function.description: Check task-level serial evidence. Prefer task_observation_check from firmware runs for arbitrary tasks; do not require unrelated fixed peripherals.

log.description: ESP serial log captured after flashing.

task_description.description: Current user task description used to decide which runtime evidence matters.

function.name: esp_run_closed_loop
function.description: Run generate -> compile -> optional flash -> optional monitor -> diagnose for an ESP workflow.

board_model.description: Human board/module model id, such as esp32-s3-n16r8, esp32-s3-n8r8, esp32-s3-n8, luatos-esp32c3-core, esp32-c3-devkitm-1, esp32-c3-devkitc-02, esp32-devkit-v1, or esp32-wrover. Used to resolve PlatformIO board, flash, PSRAM, USB CDC, and partitions.

board.description: Optional raw PlatformIO board id override. Leave empty to use board_model preset.

port.description: Optional serial port. If omitted, flash and monitor are skipped.

oled_clk_pin.description: Dedicated SPI OLED CLK/SCK GPIO. Required when oled_protocol=spi; use -1 when SPI OLED is not configured.

oled_mosi_pin.description: Dedicated SPI OLED MOSI/DIN GPIO. Required when oled_protocol=spi; use -1 when SPI OLED is not configured.

oled_protocol.description: OLED protocol: spi for 6-pin SCL/SDA/RES/DC modules, i2c for 4-pin I2C modules, auto to infer from DC pin.
